case_title: SUBEDAR ZAHEER DBA OLYMPUS PRINTING VS LUI ELIZABETH DBA TRANSWORLD REALTY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR ZAHEER DBA OLYMPUS PRINTING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUI ELIZABETH DBA TRANSWORLD REALTY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY SUBEDAR ZAHEER DBA OLYMPUS PRINTING AS TO DEFENDANT LUI ELIZABETH DBA TRANSWORLD REALTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
